specimen.localityVerbatim:
Leech, J. H., 1892-1893. Butterflies from China, Japan and Corea 3 volumes 1 map; 43 pls. London. PLATE XXXIII W.Purkiss del. Litho. Wilhelm Greve,Berlin Plate text read main text
See The Global Lepidoptera Names Index for valid names eg.

1 Luehdorfia japonica var. chinensis female (pouch figured below) = Luehdorfia chinensis Leech, 1893
2 Luehdorfia japonica female (pouch figured below) = Luehdorfia japonica Leech, 1889
3 Parnassius jacquemonti var. thibetanus male (pouch of female figured below) = Parnassius jacquemonti Boisduval, 1836
4 Parnassius delphius var. elwesi male = Parnassius delphius Eversmann, 1843
5 Parnassius citrinarius var. female (pouch figured below) = Parnassius glacialis Butler, 1866
6 Parnassius citrinarius male = Parnassius glacialis Butler, 1866
7 Sericinus telamon var. telmona male =Sericinus montela Gray, 1852 f. telamon Donovan, 1798
8 Sericinus telamon var. greyi female = =Sericinus montela Gray, 1852
9 Davidina armandi male = Davidina armandi Oberthür, 1879
10 Aporia procris male = Aporia procris Leech, 1890

notes: butterfly dorsal — head up by convention, no rotation
